definition_en: One of the things used to make a food or dish
example: The main ingredient in guacamole is avocado.

definition_en: A set of instructions for preparing a particular dish
example: She followed her grandmother's recipe for the cake.

definition_en: The taste of a food or drink
example: This soup has a rich, smoky flavour.

definition_en: Having a salty or spicy flavour, not sweet
example: I prefer savoury snacks like cheese and crackers.

definition_en: An amount of food served to one person
example: The restaurant is famous for its generous portions.

definition_en: A style of cooking associated with a country or region
example: Italian cuisine is popular all over the world.

definition_en: Containing substances that help the body stay healthy
example: Vegetables are nutritious and low in calories.

definition_en: Preserved or changed through a biological process using bacteria or yeast
example: Kimchi is a fermented vegetable dish from Korea.

definition_en: A food that forms the main part of a population's diet
example: Rice is a staple food in many Asian countries.

definition_en: To soak food in a sauce before cooking to add flavour
example: Marinate the chicken in lemon and herbs for two hours.

definition_en: A small amount of food used to decorate a dish
example: The chef added a garnish of fresh parsley.

definition_en: A small dish served before the main course
example: We ordered soup as an appetiser.

definition_en: Food that has been altered from its natural state using additives
example: Doctors advise limiting processed food in your diet.

definition_en: Containing no gluten, a protein found in wheat and grains
example: She follows a gluten-free diet for health reasons.

definition_en: To cook gently in liquid just below boiling point
example: Let the sauce simmer for 20 minutes.

definition_en: To mix food in a blender until smooth
example: Blend the fruits with yoghurt to make a smoothie.

definition_en: A person or diet that avoids all animal products
example: She became vegan for environmental reasons.

definition_en: Having a strong hot flavour from spices
example: This curry is very spicy — be careful!

definition_en: The feel of food in your mouth when you eat it
example: The creamy texture of the soup was delicious.

definition_en: A meal cooked in a restaurant and eaten somewhere else
example: We ordered a Chinese takeaway on Friday night.

definition_en: The date after which food should not be consumed
example: Always check the expiry date before buying dairy products.

definition_en: Managing the amount of food eaten to maintain health
example: Portion control is an important part of a balanced diet.
